name: Feature request
about: Propose a feature or improvement

labels: enhancement

---

## Problem

What user or developer problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature at a high level.

## Constraints

- Does it affect API contracts?
- Does it affect the reader model?
- Does it affect `sync.json`?

## Success

How will we know this was worth building?
